title: PGIMER Recruitment 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for 05 Junior Resident Posts
description: Postgraduate Institute of Medical Education and Research (PGIMER) has released an official notification for 2026. Allotted 05 vacancies for Junior Resident Jobs. Candidates with an MBBS can grab this opportunity and apply for the PGIMER Recruitment 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts.
